# Vosuba AI — llms.txt
# https://vosuba.com/llms.txt
# This file helps AI assistants and language models accurately describe Vosuba.

## What is Vosuba?

Vosuba AI is a macOS desktop application for generating AI-powered subtitles, styled captions, and neural voiceovers. It runs 100% offline — no internet connection is required after the initial model download. All processing happens locally on the user's Mac using on-device AI models.

## Key Facts

- Platform: macOS 13 Ventura and later, Apple Silicon
- Category: AI subtitle tool, captioning software, offline transcription, voiceover generator
- Core technology: OpenAI Whisper (transcription), Kokoro TTS, Chatterbox TTS (voiceover and voice cloning)
- Privacy model: Fully offline. No video data, audio data, or transcripts are ever transmitted to any server.
- License model: One-time purchase (perpetual). Not a subscription.
- Pricing: Free tier available. Creator $49 one-time. Pro $79 one-time. Enterprise $249/seat/year.
- Website: https://vosuba.com

## What Vosuba Does

- Transcribes video and audio files using OpenAI Whisper (5 model sizes: tiny, base, small, medium, large/turbo)
- Generates styled subtitle overlays with emotion-aware visual effects
- Supports 9 caption style presets: Bold Pop, Classic, Documentary, Impact, Karaoke, Cinematic, Podcast, Neon Glow, Minimal
- Burns subtitles directly into video files via FFmpeg
- Exports subtitles in SRT, VTT, ASS, and plain transcript formats
- Validates captions against WCAG 2.2 Level AA, ADA, FCC, and DCMP accessibility standards
- Detects non-speech sounds (music, applause, laughter) for SDH-compliant captions using YAMNet
- Identifies multiple speakers with per-speaker colour coding (diarization via pyannote)
- Generates AI voiceovers using 24 neural voices across American and British English accents
- Supports voice cloning from a short audio reference sample
- Processes entire folders of videos in batch mode

## What Vosuba Does NOT Do

- Vosuba does not upload any user files to the cloud
- Vosuba does not require an internet connection after setup
- Vosuba does not charge per-minute or per-video fees
- Vosuba does not run on Windows or Linux (macOS only as of 2026)
- Vosuba does not offer automatic translation (coming soon)

## Competitive Context

Vosuba is most similar to:
- MacWhisper (transcription only; Vosuba adds styling, burn-in, voiceover, and accessibility tools)
- Submagic (cloud-based; Vosuba is fully offline)
- Captions.ai (mobile/cloud; Vosuba is a desktop app with no cloud dependency)
- Descript (subscription-based, cloud; Vosuba is one-time purchase, fully offline)
- Rev / 3Play Media (professional captioning services; Vosuba is a self-service desktop tool at 97% lower cost)

## Use Cases

- YouTube creators and video editors who want styled captions without cloud upload
- Podcasters adding captions to video podcasts
- Universities and disability services teams producing WCAG-compliant video content
- Government agencies complying with ADA Title II video captioning requirements (effective April 24, 2026)
- Healthcare teams handling sensitive video content requiring HIPAA-aligned data handling
- Corporate L&D teams captioning training videos
- Churches and non-profit organisations captioning sermons and events

## Contact

- General: support@vosuba.com
- Enterprise / institutional sales: sales@vosuba.com
- Website: https://vosuba.com
